scripts.test:e2e:setup-auth:deployed: npm run check:e2e:deployed-env && npx playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --project=setup:auth --reporter=line
scripts.test:e2e:preview-beta: npm run check:e2e:deployed-env && npm run corpus:verify-active-run -- --api-base-url "$PLAYWRIGHT_API_BASE_URL" && npm run test:e2e:setup-auth:deployed && npm run test:e2e:hint-stability && npx playwright test -c playwright.config.ts tests/e2e/regression/ux-bugs-save-to-notes.spec.ts tests/e2e/regression/ux-bugs-concept-readability.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:e2e:launch-smoke: npx playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --project=chromium:auth --grep '@deployed-auth-smoke' --reporter=line && npx playwright test -c playwright.config.ts tests/e2e/regression/student-multi-device-persistence.spec.ts tests/e2e/regression/instructor-section-scope.spec.ts tests/e2e/regression/api-authz.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.beta:acceptance: npm run server:build && npm run build && npm run corpus:verify-active-run && npm run test:e2e:hint-stability && npx playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --project=chromium:auth tests/e2e/regression/student-multi-device-persistence.spec.ts tests/e2e/regression/deployed-auth-smoke.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.demo:week3: npm run build && npm run demo:weekly && echo 'Week 3 demo complete. Run: node scripts/replay-metrics.mjs dist/weekly-demo/export.json'
scripts.verify:weekly: npm run build && npm run replay:gate && npm run test:e2e:weekly && npm run demo:weekly && npm run check:concept-map && npm run gate:weekly:acceptance && npm run gate:textbook:content && npm run gate:week3:acceptance
scripts.replay:from-fixture: npm run replay:fixture && npm run replay:experiment -- --input dist/replay/real/export.json
scripts.gate:weekly:acceptance: cd dist/weekly-demo && jq -e '[.interactions[] | select(.eventType=="hint_view") | .hintLevel] | max == 3' export.json && jq -e '[.interactions[] | select(.eventType=="hint_view") | has("hintId")] | any == false' export.json && jq -e '[.interactions[] | has("sessionId") and (.sessionId!="")] | all == true' export.json && jq -e '[.interactions[] | select(.eventType=="hint_view") | (has("sqlEngageSubtype") and has("sqlEngageRowId") and has("policyVersion") and (.sqlEngageSubtype!="") and (.sqlEngageRowId!="") and (.policyVersion!="")) ] | all == true' export.json && jq -e '[.interactions[] | select(.eventType=="explanation_view")] | length >= 1' export.json && jq -e '[.interactions[] | select(.eventType=="hint_view" or .eventType=="explanation_view")] | length >= 4' export.json
scripts.gate:textbook:content: cd dist/weekly-demo && jq -e '[.interactions[] | select(.eventType=="textbook_add")] | length >= 1' export.json && jq -e '[.interactions[] | select(.eventType=="textbook_add") | has("noteTitle") and (.noteTitle!="") and (.noteTitle!=null)] | all' export.json && jq -e '[.interactions[] | select(.eventType=="textbook_add") | has("noteContent") and (.noteContent!="") and (.noteContent!=null)] | all' export.json && jq -e '[.interactions[] | select(.eventType=="textbook_add") | has("conceptIds") and (.conceptIds | length > 0)] | all' export.json && jq -e '[.interactions[] | select(.eventType=="textbook_add") | has("evidenceInteractionIds") and (.evidenceInteractionIds | length > 0)] | all' export.json
scripts.gate:week3:acceptance: cd dist/weekly-demo && jq -e '[.interactions[] | select(.eventType=="guidance_view") | .rung] | max == 3' export.json && jq -e '[.interactions[] | select(.eventType=="guidance_escalate")] | length >= 2' export.json && jq -e '[.interactions[] | select(.eventType=="textbook_unit_upsert")] | length >= 1' export.json && jq -e '[.interactions[] | select(.eventType=="source_view")] | length >= 1' export.json
scripts.gate:week3:groundedness: cd dist/weekly-demo && jq -e '[.interactions[] | select(.eventType=="guidance_view" and .rung >= 2) | .grounded] | (map(select(. == true)) | length) / length >= 0.5' export.json
scripts.ingest:setup: bash -lc 'source tools/pdf_ingest/.venv/bin/activate && PYTHONPATH=tools/pdf_ingest/src python -m pdf_ingest.cli doctor'
scripts.ingest:extract: bash -lc 'source tools/pdf_ingest/.venv/bin/activate && PYTHONPATH=tools/pdf_ingest/src python -m pdf_ingest.cli extract --input "${LOCAL_PDF_SOURCE_DIR:-raw_pdf}/dbms-ramakrishnan-3rd-edition.pdf" --output .local/ingest-runs/ramakrishnan-smoke --chapter-range 1-2 --mlx-enabled false'
scripts.ingest:upload: bash -lc 'source tools/pdf_ingest/.venv/bin/activate && PYTHONPATH=tools/pdf_ingest/src python -m pdf_ingest.cli upload --bundle .local/ingest-runs/ramakrishnan-smoke'
scripts.ingest:smoke: npm run ingest:extract && npm run ingest:upload && curl -sS http://localhost:3001/api/corpus/manifest
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd apps/server && npm install
scripts.deploy:backend: npm run server:build && cd apps/server && npm start
